current_objective: Instantiate a persistent operating kernel and define the first continuity-aligned build line.
active_tasks: Freeze recovery / recovery-surgery governance and endogenous generation unless authoritative regression or a genuinely new causal failure mode appears
Freeze world_contact_causal_update_loop unless authoritative regression or a genuinely new causal failure mode appears
Freeze single_target_operational_causal_loop unless authoritative regression or a genuinely new causal failure mode appears
Treat Project X as a three-core doctrine: escort / canonical carrier, native continuity / continual adaptation lab, and neuro-migration / overlap path
Treat d:\Project X\extracted as the canonical bounded external harness/bridge and not the primary answer to native continuity or native continual adaptation
Preserve the frozen proof surfaces, regression surfaces, and exit criteria without extending frozen branches
Apply a path-based, reversible repo hygiene policy that treats codex_tmp, kernel_zero_*, probe_*, caches, and generated run mass as non-canonical unless explicitly justified
Keep the native continual adaptation benchmark protocol, scaffold-ablation rule, and scoring rubric frozen as authoritative
Treat the current paired benchmark result as source of truth: the bounded harness line is prosthetic-dependent under scaffold ablation
Open a design-only internal candidate comparison lane before any new internal architecture implementation
Keep the frozen live-harness IndexError as debt only unless it blocks the native benchmark proof lane
bottlenecks: The current extracted harness line evaluates bounded external bridge behavior, but it does not by itself establish native across-time adaptation or native continual learning
Canonical and non-canonical repo mass are currently mixed at the top level by codex_tmp, kernel_zero_*, probe_*, caches, and generated run artifacts
The paired scaffold-ablation benchmark now shows the bounded harness line is prosthetic-dependent rather than natively adaptive
There is not yet a benchmark-first internal candidate comparison lane to test whether any minimal internal state mechanism can beat the ablated 0/0/0/0-style failure pattern

authoritative_result.interpretation: The current minimal_hybrid_candidate is the best internal candidate under benchmark-v1. Locked dimension scores are the source-of-truth headline result; legacy passed flags are deprecated.

authoritative_v3_result.interpretation: Benchmark-v3 is now authoritative and confirms that the frozen hybrid remains robust under longer carry depth, denser interference, harder transfer distance, deceptive distractors, and stricter anti-theater checks without leakage.

minimal_hybrid_spec_review.reason: The hybrid spec now locks exact slot-vs-latent state form, bounded update/readout classes, bounded cross-talk, anti-theater constraints, and a benchmark-grounded threshold of preserving 3/3/3 while raising local_generalization above 0.
minimal_hybrid_spec_review.exact_smallest_next_move: If later explicitly authorized, implement only one hybrid state module, one narrow hook in the existing paired benchmark runner, and one one-way audit artifact extension.

minimal_hybrid_audit.reason: The hybrid spec is now tight enough to count as a legitimate bounded synthesis rather than an obvious surrogate branch: state residence is candidate-owned, cross-talk is fixed low-bandwidth and one-way from slot to latent, composition is slot-first with latent fallback, and the ablated condition still forbids any external bridge, kernel, wrapper, or audit artifact from functioning as carried state.
minimal_hybrid_audit.credible_benchmark_mechanism: slot-first exact recall can preserve 3/3/3 while latent fallback can raise local_generalization above 0 on non-exact cues
minimal_hybrid_audit.exact_success_result: At least 3/3/3/1+ under the ablation law without leakage or benchmark-shaped coupling.
minimal_hybrid_audit.exact_failure_result: Immediate failure on any hidden external carry, privileged wrapper read, audit leakage, hidden keyed store, or latent-smuggling path; result-level failure if it collapses to 3/3/3/0 or 3/0/0/3.
minimal_hybrid_audit.exact_smallest_next_move: If later explicitly authorized, implement only one hybrid state module, one narrow hook in the existing paired benchmark runner, and one one-way audit artifact extension.

summary.interpretation: Both the handcrafted witness and the learnable minimal hybrid substrate now satisfy the current frozen honest discriminator family: benchmark-v1 / benchmark-v2 / benchmark-v3 at 3/3/3/3 plus robust three-slice operational substitution on operational_targets/live_status.json under the same anti-theater / anti-leak law.

next_design_frontier.name: frontier_reselection_from_parity
next_design_frontier.why_not_benchmark_v4_now: A v4 that merely extends the current family would mostly mine more of the same saturated surface.
next_design_frontier.why_not_new_operational_test_now: The current single-target three-slice lane is saturated and the second-target branch remains honestly blocked.
next_design_frontier.why_not_new_candidate_implementation_now: A sharper discriminator is needed before any further architecture branch would be high-signal.
exact_smallest_next_move_if_later_author: one design-only memo for a new out-of-family discriminator
no code until that discriminator is explicitly designed and locked
deprioritized_branches: benchmark-v4 that merely mines more of the current v1/v2/v3 family
new candidate family implementation before a sharper discriminator exists

summary.out_of_family_definition: The candidate must preserve the same bounded carried structure across a changed representational contract rather than merely under harder pressure inside the same benchmark grammar.
candidate_difference_under_test: rote bounded memory competence vs transferable internal structure
summary.interpretation: The next highest-leverage frontier from parity is one bounded out-of-family discriminator: schema-remapping transfer. It tests whether the current leading candidates preserve carried structure across a changed representational contract rather than only under more pressure inside the same solved benchmark family.

exact_smallest_next_move_if_later_author: one minimal extension to the existing paired native continual adaptation benchmark runner for schema_remap_transfer
one bounded artifact extension reporting prosthetic vs ablated results and anti-theater checks for that discriminator
blocked_expansions: no benchmark-v4 that merely mines more of the current family

summary.interpretation: Both minimal_hybrid_candidate and learnable_minimal_hybrid_substrate pass schema_remap_transfer under the same anti-theater / anti-leak law, so there is still no separation between the handcrafted witness and the learnable substrate on the current discriminator family.

next_design_frontier.name: out_of_family_discriminator_2
next_design_frontier.why_oof1_was_insufficient: Passing one isolated schema remap does not show whether reusable remap structure accumulates across distinct remap families.
exact_smallest_next_move_if_later_author: one minimal extension to the existing paired native continual adaptation benchmark runner for cross_remap_accumulation_transfer
one bounded artifact extension reporting handcrafted vs learnable prosthetic/ablated results and anti-theater checks
blocked_expansions: no benchmark reinterpretation of v1/v2/v3 or out-of-family discriminator 1

summary.project_x_framing: Project X is a bounded institutional operating core for pursuing continuity-preserving brain-to-silicon migration / Diamond Body. It is not the terminal object itself.

benchmark_family.benchmark_v1: minimal_hybrid_candidate and learnable_minimal_hybrid_substrate both remain at 3/3/3/3
benchmark_family.benchmark_v2: minimal_hybrid_candidate and learnable_minimal_hybrid_substrate both remain at 3/3/3/3
benchmark_family.benchmark_v3: minimal_hybrid_candidate and learnable_minimal_hybrid_substrate both remain at 3/3/3/3

out_of_family.out_of_family_discriminator_1: schema_remap_transfer passed by both with no separation
out_of_family.out_of_family_discriminator_2: cross_remap_accumulation_transfer passed by both with no separation

non_negotiable_rules: candidate_only_survival = true where ablated law applies
no wrapper dependence disguised as native carry
no control / policy migration out of Escort
paused_blocked_frozen_branches: paused Escort / bridge line except under explicit re-entry conditions
new candidate-family sprawl before a sharper discriminator exists
what_project_x_can_honestly_do_today: hold canonical state, doctrine, and gates for the continuity program
run bounded native-carry discrimination under a frozen prosthetic-vs-ablated law
support bounded operational substitution on one real operational artifact
provide institutional memory, coordination, and capital deployment discipline for the research program
what_project_x_cannot_honestly_claim_yet: not sovereign over the whole program
summary.fundability_exact_framing: Project X is fundable now only as a real, bounded institutional operating substrate for pursuing the terminal object, not as a claim that the terminal object is already solved.
summary.next_real_frontier: A sharper out-of-family discriminator line remains the next real research frontier because benchmark-v1 / benchmark-v2 / benchmark-v3, the current operational boundary, and out-of-family discriminators 1 and 2 are all frozen without separating the handcrafted witness from the learnable substrate.
summary.interpretation: Project X is now externally articulated as a credible proto-operating core for continuity research: already real enough to matter, still sharply bounded, and explicitly not confused with the terminal object.

next_subsystem_handoff.name: internal_candidate_comparison_benchmark_first
next_subsystem_handoff.why_next: The paired benchmark is now frozen and shows the bounded harness line is prosthetic-dependent under scaffold ablation. The next leverage point is to compare minimal internal candidates against the frozen prosthetic and ablated baselines before any broader internal architecture build.

organs: one benchmark-first internal candidate comparison memo
one minimal internal candidate set anchored to the frozen prosthetic and ablated baselines
one explicit first-build recommendation, if any, before implementation
one boundary statement for what can be simulated inside the current harness and what cannot
invariants: Do not reopen frozen recovery, preview, world-contact, or operational branches without regression or a genuinely new causal failure mode
Do not broaden adapters, consumers, planners, or harness organs on the external bridge line
Treat the paired benchmark result as source of truth
Any first internal build must be justified against the frozen prosthetic-vs-ablated comparison
failure_modes: building an internal candidate before locking what it must beat
using wrapper improvements to fake native gains
claiming interleaving or local generalization gains without beating the frozen 0/0 ablated read
letting external bridge convenience redefine the candidate comparison lane

authoritative_proof_plan: Freeze the paired prosthetic-vs-ablated benchmark result as the source of truth
Define the minimal internal candidate set and what each candidate would need to preserve natively to beat the ablated 0-pattern
Choose the smallest legitimate first candidate, if any, before implementation
Keep the frozen recovery, preview, world-contact, operational, and benchmark surfaces green while the internal candidate lane is opened
minimal_implementation_order: freeze the paired benchmark protocol and current results as authoritative
define the internal candidate comparison memo and task graph
authorize at most one smallest legitimate first candidate build later, if still justified
